description: Mexican American prison gang founded by Chino Avitia in Texas during the early 1980s. It operates in Texas prisons and communities, particularly Laredo, and is active in Mexico with a large contingent in Nuevo Laredo. The gang has over 1,000 members and is involved in trafficking cocaine and marijuana from Mexico into the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: HPL is active throughout Mexico with its largest contingent in Nuevo Laredo . The gang is structured and is estimated to have over 1,000 members. Members maintain close ties to several Mexican drug trafficking organizations and are involved in the trafficking of large quantities of cocaine and marijuana from Mexico into the United States for distribution.
country_links.context: HPL is active throughout Mexico with its largest contingent in Nuevo Laredo, and it traffics cocaine and marijuana from Mexico into the United States.
